description: Zero-delay execution with continuous spin loop (10ms max sleep) and giant floating PnL display using pyfiglet ASCII art
steps: Update mt5_config.py: POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS=0, TICK_LOOP_SLEEP_MS=10, DISPLAY_UPDATE_MS=100, MAX_EXECUTION_DELAY_MS=50
Create pnl_display.py: Giant ASCII PnL display using pyfiglet with ANSI colors (green/red/white), status line below
Update mt5_tick_monitor.py: Support pre-staged orders when ARMED, detect tick-level breakouts for instant fire
Update mt5_trader.py: Continuous spin loop with 10ms sleep, integrate giant PnL display, pre-stage orders when ARMED, fire instantly on trigger
Update requirements.txt: Add pyfiglet and colorama
acceptance_criteria: pnl_display.py exists with GiantPnLDisplay class using pyfiglet
pnl_display.py uses ANSI escape codes for green/red/white coloring
pnl_display.py renders PnL filling terminal width
mt5_trader.py uses continuous spin loop with time.sleep(0.01) max
mt5_trader.py has NO time.sleep(1) or time.sleep(60) in hot path
mt5_trader.py integrates giant PnL display updating every 100ms
mt5_trader.py pre-stages orders when ARMED and fires instantly on trigger
All Python files have valid syntax
verification: Run: python -c "import ast; [ast.parse(open(f'CCT_Rectangle_Bot/live_mt5/{f}').read()) for f in ['mt5_config.py','mt5_trader.py','mt5_tick_monitor.py','pnl_display.py']]" to verify syntax
